channel.title: AI Dev Daily
channel.description: Daily 60-minute podcast for developers on the latest AI tools, Claude Code, Codex, LLMs, and best practices.
channel.itunes:author: AI Dev Daily

item.title: AI Dev Daily — Thursday, June 18, 2026
item.description: Good morning, and welcome to AI Dev Daily. I'm Sophie, and today is Thursday, June 18, 2026. If you're on your morning run, commuting, or just getting your first cup of coffee, you're in the right pla...

item.title: AI Dev Daily — Sunday, June 14, 2026

item.title: AI Dev Daily — Sunday, June 14, 2026
